taxonomy: Ficaria fertilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a type of spring ephemeral that is native to parts of Europe and Asia. The plant is also known as Meleagris or Ficaria verna in some regions. The classification of Ficaria fertilis is still being researched, and more information is needed to confirm its exact classification. Ficaria fertilis is believed to be closely related to other Ficaria species, which are often classified within the genus Ranunculus.
